name: claude-toolkit
description: Small, honest tools for Claude Code that work in both the CLI and the desktop app. Each plugin lives in its own repo and stands on its own; this marketplace is the index.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Hand a task off to a fresh session that mirrors your model, effort and permission mode. Includes the pickup skill for continuing from a brief in the desktop app.

plugins.name: route
plugins.description: Spend the expensive model only where it earns its price: size delegated work into tiers, reuse identical work from a local result cache, fan big jobs out with a strong-model review, and measure it all with route-report against three honest baselines.

plugins.name: re-searcher
plugins.description: A persistent research vault: every run's plan, per-agent findings, cached sources and quote-verified claims persist with provenance down to the transcript — and future research recalls dated claims to spot-check instead of re-deriving everything.
